long_description:
Executing the below commands to move razee pods to another node:
kubectl cordon dal3-qz1-sr1-rk329-s02
kubectl delete po -n razee mustachetemplate-controller-5687b854bb-l5mnj

kubectl delete po -n razee remoteresource-controller-6fb4b4d75c-88hpk

Incident source: https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A3ADZL37A - Alex Ntotsikas (IaaS CORE)
short_description: Moving razee pods to another node
